zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Russell Esq.於1432年4月出生在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素時，他的父親Henry Russell MP32歲，母親Elizabeth Herring29歲。他於1449年與Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年5月9日在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Russell Esq.于1432年4月出生在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素时，他的父亲Henry Russell MP32岁，母亲Elizabeth Herring29岁。他于1449年与Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年5月9日在英国英格兰多瑟特斯享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特斯。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: German (Rüssler):
occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.
variant of Rüssel (see Russell 2).

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Americanized form of German   Raus  .
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Esq.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone living on or owning land that was waterlogged or partly surrounded by water, from Middle Low German es ‘swamp, water’.
Swiss German: from the topographic name Ess ‘grazing area, pasture’.
Swiss German: from a vernacular short form of the personal name   Oswald  .

variants.name: Esse
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik.
Norwegian: habitational name from the farmstead Ese in Sogn of unexplained etymology, or Esse in Telemark, named with Old Norse æsin ‘hill’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.
German: variant of   Ess  , or a topographic name from the river name Esse in Hesse.

variants.name: Oswald
meanings: Scottish (Fife and Lanarkshire), northern English, German, and French (mainly Alsace and Lorraine): from an Old English personal name composed of the elements ōs ‘god’ + weald ‘power’. In the Middle English period, this fell together with the less common Old Norse cognate Ásvaldr. The name was introduced to Germany from England, as a result of the fame of Saint Oswald, a 7th-century king of Northumbria, whose deeds were reported by Celtic missionaries to southern Germany. The name was also borne by a 10th-century English saint of Danish parentage, who was important as a monastic reformer. Veneration of Saint Oswald, the king, spread from the German lands to the neighbouring Slavic lands as well. The surname in the (German) spelling Oswald is thus also found especially in Czechia and Slovakia, while in North America it also absorbed various Slavic forms (see 3 below).
Irish (Down): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa (see Hussey 1).

Americanized form of Slovenian, Slovak, and Czech Osvald, Slovenian and Slovak Ožvald or Ozvald, and probably also of Slovenian Ožbolt: from vernacular forms of the German personal name Oswald, of Old English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Russell Esq. was born in April 1432, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, his father, Henry Russell MP, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Herring, was 29. He married Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere in 1449, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 May 1505, in Swyre, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Swyre, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Russell Esq. est né en avril 1432, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Henry Russell MP, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Herring, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere en 1449, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1505, à Swyre, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Swyre, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Russell Esq. im April 1432 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Russell MP 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Herring 29. Er hat 1449 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Mai 1505 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Swyre, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Swyre, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Russell Esq. è nato il nel aprile 1432 nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Henry Russell MP, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Herring, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere nel 1449, nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 maggio 1505, nel Swyre, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Swyre, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Russell Esq.が1432年4月にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルで生まれた時，父Henry Russell MPは32歳，母Elizabeth Herringは29歳であった。1449年にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルでAlice  Elizabeth Foxmereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年5月9日にイギリスイギリスドールセトスウイアで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトスウイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Russell Esq.(이)가 1432년 4월 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Russell MP(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Herring(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1449년 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스w이르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스w이르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Russell Esq. nasceu em abril de 1432, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Russell MP, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Herring, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere em 1449, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de maio de 1505, em Swyre, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Swyre, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Russell Esq. родился апрель 1432 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Russell MP было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Herring, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere в 1449 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 мая 1505 г. в местности свир, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности свир, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Russell Esq. nació en abril de 1432, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Russell MP, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Herring, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alice  Elizabeth Foxmere en 1449, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1505, en Swyre, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Swyre, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
